id.description: The unique identifier of the work order

title.description: The title of the work order

description.description: A detailed description of the work order

status.description: The current status of the work order

assigned_to.description: The ID of the user assigned to the work order

priority.description: The priority level of the work order

due_date.description: The due date and time for the work order

created_at.description: The creation timestamp of the work order

updated_at.description: The last update timestamp of the work order
